title: NXR field meta-schema
description: Validates field.schema.json. A field is a scalar or vector quantity defined on a manifold (always references a manifold via attributes.manifold_ref). The schema enumerates the operations that can be performed on a field: gradient, divergence, isolines, streamlines, Hodge decomposition, and Poisson solve. Reuses the cross-namespace primitives from common.meta.schema.json.

attributes.description: Header for the field. Required keys: manifold_ref (URI of the manifold this field lives on), kind ('scalar' | 'vector'), domain ('vertex' | 'edge' | 'face'). Optional: time_varying (bool), T (number of frames if time-varying), units, source ('measurement' | 'simulation' | 'generator' | 'derived').

values.description: The field's data buffer. Shape depends on (kind, domain).

gradient.description: Gradient of a scalar field, returned as per-face 3D vectors via Whitney interpolation of d0(values). Applies only when kind='scalar' and domain='vertex'.

divergence.description: Divergence of a vector or 1-form field, returned as a per-vertex scalar. Applies when kind='vector' (operating on face vectors lifted to a 1-form internally) or when values are an edge 1-form.

isolines.description: Extract contour polylines at evenly-spaced levels. Applies only when kind='scalar' and domain='vertex'.

streamlines.description: Trace streamlines through a face vector field. Applies only when kind='vector' and domain='face'.

hodge.description: Hodge / Helmholtz decomposition of an edge 1-form into ω = dα + δβ + γ. Applies only when domain='edge' (the field is a 1-form on edges).

poisson.description: Solve the scalar Poisson equation L φ = -M (values - mean). Applies only when kind='scalar' and domain='vertex'. Returns a per-vertex potential.
